formattedAttributes.TCGplayer Tip: Dance of the Dead is an enchantment card from the Magic: The Gathering universe with powerful reanimation abilities. It allows players to bring creatures back from the graveyard and onto the battlefield under their control. However, there is a catch - the reanimated creature is under the control of the player who cast Dance of the Dead
